step_by_step_thinking:
Fishman’s Index specifically pertains to the evaluation of hand-wrist radiographs, which helps assess the degree of arthritis or joint space narrowing. It involves measuring the interphalangeal spaces on these X-rays. The correct option here would be B: Hand wrist radiographs. Therefore:

Answer: B Fishman's Index is used for evaluating hand wrist radiographs to measure joint space changes indicative of arthritis conditions. This method provides quantifiable data regarding the progression or severity of osteoarthritis in specific joints of the hands.
